title: Founder Readiness Radar
promise: Founder readiness diagnostic across opportunity evidence, execution, resourcefulness, economics, and resilience.
audience: Aspiring founders, first-time founders, accelerators, and entrepreneurship programmes
description: Maturity assessment across Opportunity Insight, Execution Discipline, Resourcefulness & Economics, Resilience & Sustainability. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate answer-support checks.
ogDescription: Founder readiness diagnostic across opportunity evidence, execution, resourcefulness, economics, and resilience.
